narrative:
Alger / Mcguffey / Marion (precinct in Hardin County) has 1,407 registered voters, with 55.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 19.5 percentage points.
